sql_array: CREATE TABLE languages (id UInt32, text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO languages (id, text) VALUES (1, '二兎を追う者は一兎をも得ず'), (2, 'A vaincre sans peril, on triomphe sans gloire.');
SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(text) AS lang_perc FROM languages WHERE detectLanguageMixed(text)['ja'] > 0.5;
SELECT id, text, (detectLanguageMixed(text)['en'] - detectLanguageMixed(text)['ja']) AS lang_diff FROM languages;
SELECT id, text, detectLanguageMixed(text) AS lang_map FROM languages WHERE (id < 10 - 3) AND (NULLIF(detectLanguageMixed(text)['en'], 0) IS NOT NULL);
WITH detectLanguageMixed(text) AS lang_data SELECT id, lang_data, lang_data['ja'] - 0.5 AS adjusted_percentage FROM (SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(text) AS lang_data FROM languages);
CREATE TABLE processed_languages AS SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(text) AS lang_map FROM languages GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
INSERT INTO processed_languages (id, lang_map) SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(text) FROM languages WHERE text != '';
SELECT id, (detectLanguageMixed(text)['en'] - (detectLanguageMixed(text)['de'] + detectLanguageMixed(text)['fr'])) AS language_balance FROM languages HAVING language_balance IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, text, (detectLanguageMixed(text)['ja'] + detectLanguageMixed(text)['fr']) / 2.0 AS avg_lang_perc FROM languages WHERE text LIKE '%A vaincre%' ORDER BY avg_lang_perc DESC;
